title: Default Dark Mode: Expansion
description: 🌙➕This resource pack is an add-on of Default Dark Mode. It adds/fixes over 100+ mods! It is recommended to use both resource packs together for the best experience.
body:
# Default Dark Mode: Expansion
(Minecraft 1.12.x, 1.16.x, 1.18.x & 1.19.x-26.x) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode-expansion) [](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/default-dark-mode-expansion) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/default-dark-mode-expansion-1-19-1-21) # About This resource pack is an add-on towards the "Default Dark Mode" Resource Pack by NebuIr. It adds, improves and updates textures for over 100 Minecraft mods (v2025.7.1 & higher)! To get the best out of "Default Dark Mode: Expansion", it's recommended to use this pack along with the original "Default Dark Mode" resource pack together for the best experience.
Default Dark Mode Expansion: NEWS (2025-2026) # Default Dark Mode: Expansion's Repo Migration (January-14-2026) Hello once again! I have migrated the "Default Dark Mode: Expansion" repo over from github to codeberg! codeberg will be the main repository for the resource pack, but you can still request issues like mod support or outdated mod textures over to github still! Here's the original [GitHub](https://github.com/aricloverEXTRA/Default-Dark-Mode-Expansion) version if you still want to check it out and use it! # Default Dark Mode: Expansion's Pull Request (June-28-2025) Hello! This is a temporary section related to only the "Pull Request", This project hasn't gotten much updates since June 2025 because I'm waiting for the following Pull Request [https://github.com/nebuIr/Default-Dark-Mode/pull/213](https://github.com/nebuIr/Default-Dark-Mode/pull/213) to get merged! It's the reason why I created **Default Dark Mode: Expansion**, this Pull Request should not be taking this long.
# Dependencies (recommended) To make **Default Dark Mode: Expansion** work correctly, you'll need to have the original [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode/version/2025.6.0-1.21.6) Resource Pack and have it ordered like this.
Click to view removed content key: 🚚 Restored: Mod support that was previously available but had been removed; now reinstated.
- 🚚 Restored support for [Backpacked](https://github.com/MrCrayfish/Backpacked) **(1.20+)** - 🚚 Restored support for [Compact Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-storage) **(1.20+)** (The following **Restored** assets are not allowed to be included in the CurseForge and Modrinth versions due to licensing restrictions.)
